title: Feedback and Notes apps ship, chat scroll overhauled, agent reliability hardened
intro: A dense nightly that delivered two new first-class apps — Feedback and Notes — while simultaneously replacing the chat panel's virtualizer with native CSS scroll anchoring to eliminate the long-standing resize jank. Agent session management got deterministic cancellation and proper context scoping, and the release pipeline gained build-version surfacing across all CI targets.
highlights: Chat scroll jank eliminated via CSS anchor rewrite
Feedback app launched with live API, votes, and product filtering
Notes app added with TipTap editor, slug paths, and context menus
Agent session reset made race-condition-free with cancellable runs
Build version now visible in Settings and Team Settings on all platforms
Release changelog tooling hardened with rubric fixtures

title: Interface Polish & Chat Streaming Improvements
intro: Major improvements to chat streaming, tool preview cards, and interface polish. Enhanced spec and file tool streaming with live preview, simplified settings navigation, and strengthened chat session persistence.
highlights: Live streaming tool previews for specs and files
Simplified settings navigation with logout in team panel
Fixed chat history persistence across app restarts
Improved task status reliability across all views

title: Mobile Workspace Shell and Chat Performance Overhaul
intro: Today's release introduces a dedicated mobile workspace shell with streamlined navigation and rebuilds the chat system with bottom-anchored virtualization to eliminate scroll jank. We've also enhanced release infrastructure with automated changelog generation and improved CI reliability.
highlights: Mobile workspace shell with streamlined navigation and agent workflows
Bottom-anchored chat virtualization eliminates scroll jank
Automated AI-powered changelog generation for releases
Significant startup performance improvements with lazy loading
